title: Smoky Date Night Tacos
description: These smoky date night tacos are tender and perfect for a Brazilian dish that pairs well with hard taco shells. They are low-fat-friendly.

ingredients.name: Ground beef or turkey
ingredients.notes: For the smoky flavor, you can use ground beef mixed with a smoked sausage crumble.

ingredients.name: Date purée
ingredients.notes: Fresh or frozen dates work well.

instructions: Prepare taco shells by lightly brushing with olive oil and adding a small amount of salt.
Mix ground beef or turkey, minced garlic, paprika, and date purée in a large bowl. Season with salt and pepper as desired.
Divide the filling evenly among the prepared taco shells. Place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15-20 minutes until cooked through. Let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve with your favorite toppings such as avocado crema or fresh cilantro.
Cook ground beef to an internal temperature of 71°C / 160°F (no longer pink in the middle) before serving.
